DinerFrenzySpinsPaytable.ScatterSymbolRule: Scatter symbol appears on reels 1, 3 and 5 only.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytable.PayoutRules1: Diner Frenzy Spins is a 5-reels, 4-rows video slot featuring connecting ways and sticky symbol respins.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytable.PayoutRules2: The game is played with 20 base bet for 178 - 421 connecting ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytable.PayoutDesc: Bonus Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Bonus Feature.

DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.MysteryRespinFeatureDesc1: During any spin, the Mystery Respin may be randomly triggered while the reels are spinning.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.MysteryRespinFeatureDesc2: At the start of the Mystery Respin, a set of low-paying symbols and high-paying symbols (Ice Cream - Sundae set, Small Soda - Large Soda set, Fries - Cheese Fries set, Chicken Wing - Bucket of Chickens set or Mini Burger - Hamburger set) will be randomly chosen.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.MysteryRespinFeatureDesc3: The reels will consist only the selected set of low paying symbol and high paying symbol, with the other symbols become inactive.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.MysteryRespinFeatureDesc4: After all reels stop spinning, if there are 1 or more additional symbols (either the selected low paying symbol or the selected high paying symbol) appearing on the reels, the low paying symbol, if any, will be transformed into the high paying symbol, and all reels will respin again with the previously appeared symbols staying in their positions.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.MysteryRespinFeatureDesc5: If there is a total of 10 symbols on the reels, an additional row will be added to make each reel having 5 symbols.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.MysteryRespinFeatureDesc6: If there is a total of 20 symbols on the reels, an additional row will be added to make each reel having 6 symbols.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.MysteryRespinFeatureDesc7: If there is a total of 30 symbols on the reels, an additional row will be added to make each reel having 7 symbols.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.MysteryRespinFeatureDesc8: After all reels stop spinning, if there are no more additional symbols (either the selected low paying symbol or the selected high paying symbol) appearing on the reels, the Mystery Respin ends and wins are paid.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.BonusFeatureDesc1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Bonus Feature.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.BonusFeatureDesc2: At the start of the Bonus Feature, a set of low-paying symbols and high-paying symbols (Ice Cream - Sundae set, Small Soda - Large Soda set, Fries - Cheese Fries set, Chicken Wing - Bucket of Chickens set or Mini Burger - Hamburger set) will be randomly chosen.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.BonusFeatureDesc3: The reels will consist only the selected set of low paying symbol and high paying symbol, with the other symbols become inactive.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.BonusFeatureDesc4: At the start of the Bonus Feature, 3 bonus spins are awarded and every additional symbol will reset the bonus spin counter back to 3.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.BonusFeatureDesc5: After all reels stop spinning, if there are 1 or more additional symbols (either the selected low paying symbol or the selected high paying symbol) appearing on the reels, the low paying symbol, if any, will be transformed into the high paying symbol, and all reels will respin again with the previously appeared symbols staying in their positions.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.BonusFeatureDesc6: The Bonus Feature ends and wins are paid when the bonus spin counter reaches zero.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.MaximumWinDesc1: The maximum win amount is %{2105}x of the bet amount.
DinerFrenzySpinsPaytableShared.MaximumWinDesc2: If the total win in the main game or the Bonus Feature reaches %{2105}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

DinerFrenzySpinsWinWays.Desc1: Bet ways win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to the right, with the winning symbols touching each other side by side or diagonally.
DinerFrenzySpinsWinWays.Desc2: Total number of winning bet ways for each symbol are calculated by multiplying the number of adjacent winning symbols for each symbol from the leftmost reel to the right.
DinerFrenzySpinsWinWays.Desc3: The winning symbol payout is multiplied by the number of winning bet ways.
